Helping Brands

The Web House is a Gauteng-based creative digital and technology agency helping businesses build stronger brands, professional websites and reliable digital systems.

Our Story

Creative Digital
And Technology
Solutions

Founded in 2016 from humble beginnings in a garage, The Web House has grown into a trusted agency serving over 300 clients across South Africa and Namibia. We combine creativity, technology and strategy to help businesses communicate better, attract more customers and operate with confidence.

What We
Offer

We provide creative, digital and technology solutions designed to help businesses grow. Pricing is not displayed publicly because every quotation is tailored to the client’s requirements, timeline and project scope.

For
Business

01

Web Development

Professional websites, landing pages, redesigns, maintenance, domain and hosting support.

02

Graphic Design

Logo design, corporate identity, business profiles, flyers, posters and social media artwork.

03

Printing

Business cards, banners, brochures, signage, stickers, stationery and promotional material.

04

Marketing

Digital marketing strategy, content creation, campaign artwork and brand awareness support.

05

IT Support

Desktop support, email setup, software installation, printer support and troubleshooting.

06

Software Development

Custom business systems, web applications, portals, dashboards and workflow automation.

07

Motion Graphics

Animated adverts, logo animations, social media videos, explainers and campaign videos.

08

IT Consulting

Technology planning, digital transformation advice, infrastructure guidance and solutions.
